results.description: _run_single_handler publishes terminal event after classification for COMPLETED and FAILED paths
results.evidence: runtime_local.py — _publish_synthesized_terminal() helper added (lines ~453-500); _run_single_handler calls it on sync-return paths after self._result = self._classify_result(). status_payload branches on COMPLETED vs FAILED. Source file commit da57e312 in omnibase_core worktree.

Payload JSON emitted by _publish_synthesized_terminal: {'status': 'success'|'failure', 'correlation_id': str(uuid.uuid4()), 'source': 'runtime_local'}. Verified by code inspection + test assertion on runtime._events_received['(terminal)'] >= 1.

results.description: _run_event_driven unchanged (verified via test or code review)
results.evidence: Diff confirms _run_event_driven body is untouched. _publish_synthesized_terminal is called only from _run_single_handler, not from _run_event_driven. The event-driven path still relies on handler-published terminals per plan Task 5 decision #1.

omnimarket/tests/test_proof_runtime_local_merge_sweep.py::test_runtime_local_publishes_terminal_event_to_bus PASSED. Test runs node_merge_sweep L1A path then asserts terminal_count = runtime._events_received.get('(terminal)', 0) >= 1. Commit dfbb137.

results.description: omnibase_core/CLAUDE.md Handler Output Constraints section updated
results.evidence: New subsection 'Runtime-synthesized terminal events (OMN-8940)' added under Handler Output Constraints. Documents the payload shape, the single-handler-path scope, and the rationale.

results.description: Full suites green in both repos
results.evidence: omnibase_core: 362 unit runtime tests pass (uv run pytest tests/unit/runtime/ tests/test_runtime_local_input_flag.py -q --timeout=30). omnimarket: 3 of 3 proof tests pass (baseline + L1A + L1B). No regressions in covered areas.
omnibase_core commit da57e312 on branch jonah/omn-runtime-proof. omnimarket commit dfbb137 on branch jonah/omn-runtime-proof. Push bundled into Task 7 (OMN-8942) per plan routing.

Gate 6: 'At least one message is recorded on the terminal topic onex.evt.omnimarket.merge-sweep-completed.v1 during the L1 run, observable via RuntimeLocal._events_received["(terminal)"] >= 1.' Test assertion confirms terminal count >= 1 after sync-return L1A invocation of node_merge_sweep.
